source: Rec Staff MCP (live rec.us database snapshot)

orgs.name: City of West Sacramento Parks & Recreation
Mission Oaks Recreation and Park District

features.name: Age Eligibility on Sections
features.description: Restricting who can register for a section based on a minimum/maximum age.
features.signal: eligibility_rule.attribute_name (value 'age' or 'date_of_birth') with eligibility_rule.comparison_operator/attribute_value, linked to a section via eligibility_rule_group_lookup.section_id; section.age_evaluation_type governs how the age date is resolved
features.adoption_definition: Has >=1 section with an age-based eligibility rule attached (an eligibility_rule whose attribute is age/date_of_birth, joined through eligibility_rule_group_lookup.section_id)
features.measure_question: How many of this organization's sections have an age minimum or maximum eligibility requirement, and how many sections does it have in total?

features.name: Grade Eligibility on Sections
features.description: Restricting section registration to specific school grade levels.
features.signal: eligibility_rule.attribute_name = 'grade' (with attribute_value/comparison_operator), linked to a section via eligibility_rule_group_lookup.section_id
features.adoption_definition: Has >=1 section with a grade-based eligibility rule attached
features.measure_question: How many of this organization's sections have a grade-level eligibility requirement, and how many sections total?

features.name: Residency-Based Eligibility Zones
features.description: Auto-assigning residents to a group (for resident pricing/access) using ZIP-code or geographic-polygon zones.
features.signal: table: residency_zipcode_group (zip_code, group_id); table: residency_polygon_group (geometry, group_id); table: organization_residency_transfer
features.measure_question: How many residency zones (ZIP-code groups plus polygon groups) has this organization defined?

features.name: Enrollment Prerequisites
features.description: Requiring participants to meet a prior condition (segment membership) before they can enroll in a section.
features.adoption_definition: Has >=1 active prereq row (activated_at is not null)
features.measure_question: How many of this organization's sections have an enrollment prerequisite configured, and how many sections total?

features.name: Scheduled Registration Windows
features.description: Opening and closing registration for a section at specific scheduled times.
features.measure_question: How many of this organization's sections have a scheduled registration window (open/close times), and how many sections total?

features.name: Member Early-Access Registration Windows
features.description: Giving a specific member group early or exclusive registration access via a group-scoped window.
features.adoption_definition: Has >=1 registration_window with type='group' and a group_id
features.measure_question: How many registration windows are restricted to a specific member group, and how many registration windows are there in total?

features.name: Invite-Only / Restricted Registration
features.description: Setting sections to a registration mode other than open, such as invite-only or waitlist-only.
features.signal: section.registration_mode (values other than 'open', e.g. invite_only, waitlist); session.registration_mode override
features.adoption_definition: Has >=1 section whose registration_mode is not 'open'
features.measure_question: How many sections have a registration mode other than open (e.g. invite-only or waitlist-only), and how many sections total?

features.name: Section Waitlists
features.description: Allowing participants to join a waitlist when a section is full.
features.signal: section.waitlist_config (JSONB, e.g. {"enabled": true, "maxSize": 20}); section.waitlist_override; table: waitlist (participant_user_id, section_id)
features.adoption_definition: Has >=1 section with waitlist_config enabled, or >=1 waitlist entry
features.measure_question: How many of this organization's sections have a waitlist enabled, and how many sections total?

features.name: Required Participant Info
features.description: Requiring certain profile attributes to be filled in before a participant can register.
features.adoption_definition: Has >=1 section with required_info_config set (not null)
features.measure_question: How many sections have required participant info configured, and how many sections total?

features.name: Custom Booking Questions
features.description: Collecting custom per-registration answers (e.g. t-shirt size, dietary needs) via program-level booking questions.
features.signal: table: default_booking_question (program_id, data JSONB); table: booking_question_response
features.adoption_definition: Has >=1 default_booking_question configured, or >=1 booking_question_response collected
features.measure_question: How many of this organization's programs have custom booking questions configured, and how many programs total?

features.name: Custom Forms
features.description: Building dynamic custom forms attached to sections, sites, or products to collect structured responses.
features.signal: table: form (schema JSONB); table: form_lookup (section_id/site/product); table: form_submission
features.measure_question: How many custom forms has this organization created, and how many form submissions has it collected?

features.name: Waivers & Legal Contracts
features.description: Requiring participants to sign waivers or legal contracts (e.g. on booking).
features.measure_question: How many waiver/contract versions has this organization set up?

features.name: Reusable Forms On File
features.description: Letting participants reuse a previously submitted form instead of re-filling it each time.
features.measure_question: How many of this organization's form attachments are set to reuse a form on file, and how many form attachments total?

features.name: Guest Participation
features.description: Allowing non-member guests to join program sessions, often at a separate guest price.
features.measure_question: How many of this organization's programs allow guest participants, and how many programs total?

features.name: Skill-Level Tagging
features.description: Assigning a recommended/required skill level to programs or sections.
features.adoption_definition: Has >=1 section with skill_level set (not null)
features.measure_question: How many sections have a skill level set, and how many sections total?

features.name: Add-On Products
features.description: Offering optional or required add-on products alongside a section, site, or activity.
features.signal: table: addon (product_id, is_required, min_quantity, max_quantity, pricing_strategy)
features.measure_question: How many add-on products has this organization configured, and how many of those are required add-ons?

features.name: Seasons
features.description: Grouping sections into named time periods (e.g. Spring 2025) with templated defaults.
features.signal: table: season (name, start_date, end_date, section_template JSONB); table: section_season
features.measure_question: How many seasons has this organization created, and how many sections are assigned to a season?

features.name: Instructor Profiles & Private Lessons
features.description: Maintaining instructor profiles, including instructors who offer private lessons.
features.signal: table: instructor (user_id, can_teach_private_lessons, is_pro, is_contractor); table: instructor_reservation_request
features.measure_question: How many instructor profiles has this organization set up, and how many of them offer private lessons?

features.name: Instructor Certifications
features.description: Tracking instructor credentials and their expiration for compliance.
features.measure_question: How many instructor certifications are recorded, and how many instructors does the organization have?

features.name: Memberships
features.description: Selling recurring or term memberships that grant access and pricing benefits.
features.signal: group_schema.type = 'membership'; table: membership (group_id, status, start_at, end_at); table: membership_user
features.adoption_definition: Has >=1 membership record or >=1 membership-type group_schema
features.measure_question: How many memberships has this organization issued, and how many are currently active (status = 'active')?

features.name: Auto-Renewing Memberships
features.description: Memberships that automatically renew via recurring Stripe billing.
features.adoption_definition: Has >=1 membership with a stripe_subscription_id or next_renewal_at set, or a group_schema with auto_renewal = true
features.measure_question: How many of this organization's memberships are set to auto-renew (have a Stripe subscription), and how many memberships total?

features.name: Passes / Punch Passes
features.description: Selling multi-use passes (e.g. 10-visit punch cards) with defined coverage and expiry.
features.signal: table: pass_schema (start_mechanism, end_mechanism, config e.g. totalUses); table: pass; table: pass_user
features.measure_question: How many pass types (pass schemas) has this organization set up, and how many passes have been issued?

features.name: Group/Pass Benefit Rules
features.description: Defining the access or pricing-discount benefits that a membership group or pass grants.
features.signal: table: benefit_rule (type, access_config JSONB, pricing_config JSONB, group_id, pass_schema_id); table: benefit_usage
features.measure_question: How many benefit rules has this organization configured, and how many of them are pricing-discount benefits (type = 'pricing_discount')?

features.name: Physical Access Control Devices
features.description: Using door scanners/readers to grant physical entry via membership or pass.
features.signal: table: physical_access_device (seam_device_id); table: physical_access_device_scan_event (access, membership_id, pass_id)
features.measure_question: How many physical access control devices (door scanners) has this organization registered?

features.name: Facility Rentals
features.description: Renting out facilities/spaces to customers via rental agreements.
features.measure_question: How many facility rentals has this organization created, and how many locations does it have?

features.name: Rental Applications
features.description: Requiring an application (with approval flow) before a facility can be rented at a site.
features.adoption_definition: Has >=1 site with rental_application_enabled = true, or >=1 rental_application
features.measure_question: How many sites have rental applications enabled, and how many sites (courts) does the organization have in total?

features.name: Instant Booking
features.description: Letting customers instantly confirm court/site reservations without admin approval.
features.adoption_definition: Has >=1 court with is_instant_bookable = true, or >=1 site_instant_booking_configuration
features.measure_question: How many of this organization's sites/courts are instant-bookable, and how many sites total?

features.name: Reservation Buffer Times
features.description: Enforcing a gap between back-to-back reservations on a court, or at a location.
features.adoption_definition: Has >=1 court with a nonzero buffer_minutes_between_reservations (or override), or a location with reservation_buffer set
features.measure_question: How many courts have a buffer time between reservations set (greater than zero), and how many courts total?

features.name: Security Deposits
features.description: Collecting refundable security/damage deposits on facility rentals.
features.measure_question: How many security deposits has this organization collected, and how many facility rentals does it have?

features.name: Facility Rental Permits
features.description: Issuing official permits for facility rentals.
features.measure_question: How many facility rental permits has this organization issued, and how many facility rentals does it have?

features.name: Member Reservation-Window Overrides
features.description: Giving specific member groups different court booking windows or duration limits.
features.measure_question: How many group-specific reservation-window overrides has this organization set up, and how many sites (courts) does it have?

features.name: Discount / Promo Codes
features.description: Offering promo codes with usage limits and validity windows.
features.signal: table: discount_code (code, pricing_adjustment JSONB, is_active, max_total_redemptions); table: discount_redemption
features.measure_question: How many discount/promo codes has this organization created, and how many redemptions have been recorded?

features.name: Payment Plans / Installments
features.description: Letting customers pay for a registration in scheduled installments.
features.adoption_definition: Has >=1 section with available_payment_plans set, or >=1 payment_plan_installment
features.measure_question: How many of this organization's sections offer a payment plan (installments), and how many sections total?

features.name: Gift Cards
features.description: Selling gift cards that create stored-value accounts for later redemption.
features.measure_question: How many gift card products has this organization configured, and how many gift card accounts have been issued?

features.name: Scholarships / Financial Aid
features.description: Granting scholarship stored-value to help recipients pay for programs.
features.measure_question: How many scholarship programs has this organization set up, and how many scholarship awards (stored value accounts) have been granted?

features.name: Store Credit / Account Credit
features.description: Maintaining per-user account credit balances that can be applied to purchases.
features.adoption_definition: Has >=1 credit_account with a nonzero balance, or >=1 credit transaction
features.measure_question: How many of this organization's users have a store-credit account with a nonzero balance, and how many credit accounts total?

features.name: Structured Refund Policies
features.description: Applying automated time-based refund rules to bookings.
features.signal: table: structured_refund_policy (rules JSONB, paused); section.structured_refund_policy_id; section.structured_refund_policy_paused
features.adoption_definition: Has >=1 structured_refund_policy defined, or >=1 section with structured_refund_policy_id set
features.measure_question: How many sections have a structured refund policy applied, and how many sections total?

features.name: Member / Group Pricing Tiers
features.description: Charging different prices to specific member groups (e.g. resident vs non-resident pricing).
features.signal: section_price.group_id (not null = group-restricted tier); section_price.type (e.g. group_member, early_bird)
features.adoption_definition: Has >=1 section_price with a group_id set
features.measure_question: How many sections have a group-specific (member) price tier, and how many sections have any custom price tier at all?

features.name: Tax Collection
features.description: Applying sales tax to products or court reservations.
features.adoption_definition: Has >=1 product or court with tax_bps greater than zero
features.measure_question: How many products and courts have a nonzero tax rate configured, and how many products/courts are there in total?

features.name: Cash & Check Payments
features.description: Accepting in-person cash or check payments (beyond card/online).
features.adoption_definition: Has >=1 payment with payment_method_type of cash or check
features.measure_question: How many payments has this organization taken by cash or check, and how many payments total?

features.name: GL Accounting Configuration
features.description: Categorizing revenue into a chart of general-ledger accounts for finance reporting.
features.signal: table: gl_account (name, gl_code); table: gl_config (revenue-type to GL-account mappings); program.gl_account_id / court.gl_account_id / section.gl_account_id
features.adoption_definition: Has >=1 gl_account defined (chart of accounts populated)
features.measure_question: How many general-ledger accounts has this organization set up in its chart of accounts?

features.name: SMS Messaging
features.description: Sending SMS messages to users (marketing and/or transactional).
features.adoption_definition: Has an organization_sms_config with an SMS number set, or >=1 message with channel = 'sms'
features.measure_question: How many SMS messages has this organization sent (channel = 'sms'), and how many messages has it sent in total across all channels?

features.name: Email Messaging / Campaigns
features.description: Sending email messages/campaigns to users and tracking delivery.
features.measure_question: How many email messages has this organization sent, and how many total email deliveries (recipients) do those represent?

features.name: Custom Sending Email Domains
features.description: Sending email from the org's own verified custom domain rather than a default.
features.measure_question: How many custom email domains has this organization set up, and how many of them are verified (status = 'verified')?

features.name: Notification Subscription Types
features.description: Defining custom notification subscription categories users can opt in/out of.
features.measure_question: How many notification subscription types has this organization created?

features.name: Audience Segments
features.description: Building dynamic user segments for targeted messaging and eligibility.
features.measure_question: How many audience segments has this organization created?

features.name: Competitions / Leagues
features.description: Running leagues, tournaments, or round-robins with teams and matches.
features.signal: table: competition (type league/tournament); table: competition_section; table: competition_event; table: competition_team
features.measure_question: How many competitions (leagues/tournaments) has this organization created, and how many teams exist across them?

features.name: Public Storefront Products
features.description: Publishing products for sale in the public online storefront.
features.adoption_definition: Has >=1 product with display_in_store or publish_to_public = true
features.measure_question: How many products are published to the public storefront, and how many products does the organization have in total?

features.name: POS Desk Locations
features.description: Processing in-person point-of-sale transactions at physical desk/till locations.
features.signal: table: desk_location (name, enforce_access_control); transaction_event.desk_location_id; table: product_desk_location
features.measure_question: How many POS desk locations has this organization set up, and how many transactions were processed at a desk?

features.name: Cash Reconciliation Reports
features.description: Reconciling cash drawers with over/short reporting and deposit slips.
features.measure_question: How many cash reconciliation reports has this organization created?

features.name: Custom Staff Roles & Permissions
features.description: Defining custom staff roles with granular can_* permissions and assigning them to users.
features.signal: table: organization_role (can_* permission flags); table: organization_user_role; table: organization_user
features.adoption_definition: Has >=1 organization_role defined and assigned via organization_user_role
features.measure_question: How many custom staff roles has this organization created, and how many staff users have a role assigned?

features.name: Alternate IDs / External System Integration
features.description: Storing external-system identifiers (e.g. IMLeagues) against users for cross-system integration.
features.measure_question: How many users have an alternate identity from an external system, and from how many distinct sources?

features.name: CRM / Household Notes
features.description: Staff keeping CRM-style admin notes on households.
features.measure_question: How many household notes has this organization's staff created, and how many households are associated with the organization?

notes: Core usage counts verified against live DB (each number required a real preview_query execution). null = count could not be verified for that org/metric. Feature-adoption measurements pending.
